scenarios.name: Trojan-Egress
scenarios.description: Detection of exfiltration paths using SNI and Host header bypass techniques.

scenarios.name: Side-Channel-Leak
scenarios.description: Simulation of data leakage via packet timing and size modulation.

scenarios.name: Buffer-Overflow-Sim
scenarios.description: Injection of crafted payloads to test SOC alert triggers and buffer handling.

soc_alerts.description: Unauthorized outbound connection detected from a blocked application.
Attempted firewall bypass via XPC service or child process lineage.
System firewall (pf) or daemon integrity compromise detected.
Unauthorized access attempt to the privileged daemon socket.

guardrails.name: Zero-Sanitization Enforcement
guardrails.description: Mandatory check to prevent logic truncation and ensure high-fidelity implementation.

guardrails.name: Kernel-Integrity Check
guardrails.description: Periodic validation of pf anchor state and kernel-level logging interfaces.
